name: Retatrutide
shortDesc: A next-generation wellness support formula designed for individuals focused on advanced lifestyle optimization, performance, and modern wellness innovation.
fullDesc: Retatrutide is engineered as a next-generation wellness support formula for individuals who pursue advanced lifestyle optimization. Each Omavi pen is pre-mixed and ready to deliver precision dosing with no preparation, no calibration, and zero compromise on consistency.
Designed with modern wellness innovation in mind, Retatrutide is part of the Omavi performance line — created for those who hold themselves to a higher standard of recovery, vitality, and longevity.

benefits.d: Supports modern metabolic balance as part of a holistic wellness protocol.
Formulated for individuals focused on high-performance lifestyle goals.
A next-generation companion designed around modern wellness routines.
Manufactured under strict purity, stability, and consistency standards.

protocol.d: Wash hands thoroughly and disinfect the injection site.
Attach a new sterile needle and prime per the included instructions.
Inject subcutaneously and rotate the site each application.

name: BPC-157 + TB-500
shortDesc: An advanced recovery-focused wellness blend created for active lifestyles and modern recovery support.
fullDesc: A dual-peptide wellness formula combining BPC-157 and TB-500 — Omavi's most-requested recovery and mobility blend. Built for active lifestyles, this pre-mixed pen is engineered for individuals who refuse to compromise on their recovery routine.

Each pen delivers precise dosing of both peptides in stabilized form, removing the guesswork from advanced recovery protocols. Like all Omavi products, it ships cold-chain protected to guarantee freshness.

benefits.d: Built around a modern recovery-first wellness philosophy.
Designed for active individuals who depend on consistent mobility.
Stabilized BPC-157 + TB-500 in a single precision pen.
Engineered for performance-focused recovery routines.

protocol.d: Wash hands thoroughly and disinfect the injection site.

Inject subcutaneously and rotate the site each application.
